<img align="right" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="310" alt="mekyrus"/>

## `whoami`

```yaml
name      : Aryan Sinha
alias     : mekyrus
class     : AI-Augmented Developer
primary   : Python · LLMs · Server Infra
vision    : "See beyond what eyes allow"
location  : India 🇮🇳
status    : [ building | deploying | breaking ]
```

I weaponize AI to build things faster than most people  
can write a project plan. Python scripts, hosted servers,  
deployed APIs — every project is a boss fight I intend to win.

> *"Those who see with the mind will always see beyond*  
> *those who only rely on their eyes."*

> *"The real shift happens when you see things as they are,*  
> *not as you want them to be."*

<br clear="right"/>

<img src="https://i.imgur.com/dBaSKWF.gif" height="22" width="100%">

<div align="center">

## ⚡ Top Projects

</div>

| Project | What it does | Stack |
|---------|-------------|-------|
| 🤖 **AI Automation Pipelines** | Chains of agents replacing hours of manual work | `Python` `LangChain` `Claude API` |
| 🌐 **Self-Hosted Server Infra** | VPS, Nginx reverse proxy, configured from scratch | `Linux` `Nginx` `VPS` `Docker` |
| 📡 **RAG Document Agents** | AI that reads, indexes and answers from your files | `Python` `OpenAI` `FAISS` |
| ⚙️ **Automation Scripts** | Scripts that automate me out of doing actual work | `Python` `Bash` `Cron` |

*Every commit is a small, desperate apology to my future self.*
